sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36698" key="e(came/reia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑξᾰμέρ-εια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n36698.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">division into six parts,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.7.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
